Plot function for sps_estimator

plot.sps_estimator.Rd

Plot function for sps_estimator

Usage

# S3 method for class 'sps_estimator'
plot(x, ...)

Arguments

x

Output from function sps_estimator()

...

Other arguments.

Value

sps_plot_est plots estimates and 95

References

Egami and Lee. (2023+). Designing Multi-Context Studies for External Validity: Site Selection via Synthetic Purposive Sampling. Available at https://naokiegami.com/paper/sps.pdf.
